text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 投资研究不是只找利好。下面这些信号出现，说明“高景气能转成好利润”的假设需要下修。

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 电芯/系统继续快速降价，设备商收入增长被 ASP 抹平

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 独立储能调用小时低，容量补偿覆盖不足

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 省级现货、辅助服务、容量补偿迟迟落地慢

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 关税、本土内容、认证和供应链导致交付延期

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 火灾事故或质量问题导致准入收紧、保险成本上升

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 订单增长但应收、存货和现金流恶化

text.font-family: Arial Unicode MS, PingFang SC, Hiragino Sans GB, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 跟踪频率：政策月度/季度跟踪，公司财报季度跟踪，项目事故和海外关税即时跟踪。
